name: AREthRemoveFieldConsumer
title: AREthRemoveFieldConsumer
description: Removes a Field from a Consumed Service Instance. The Field was previously added by AREthCreateFieldConsumer.
Afterwards, the callback registered with AREthCreateFieldConsumer is no longer called.

parameters.name: cfHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the field that was created by AREthCreateFieldConsumer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
